title: Subitem summary Column total all
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’m able to show the summary hours for subitems on the individual rows, but not able to see the total summary of all the roles. Is this possible? This would be extremely helpful.

posts.author: Meade (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m able to show the summary hours for subitems on the individual rows, but not able to see the total summary of all the roles. Is this possible? This would be extremely helpful.

Screen Shot 2023-10-22 at 10.22.54 AM2576×508 31.2 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Meade

Welcome to the community! Indeed monday does not support summarizing the subitem summaries columns. There is an app in the marketplace called Rollup Subitems that uses a different approach to summarizing subitems. This app shows the subitem summary in a normal numbers column in the parent items and therefore will also show the total for all subitem columns.

posts.author: PayWay369 (paytonwest@hotmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the feedback.
Is this enhancement on the roadmap? It seems to be common use case.

The roll-up 3rd party app could potentially halfway work but paying for a 3rd party app to sum the total of values in a table doesn’t seem feasible in the long term.

posts.author: ebannister (Elliot Bannister)
posts.cookedHtml: A workaround that I’m using is to add a Formula column, and to set the formula as a reference to the summary column. Then I was able to display a total on the formula column. (I also collapsed the actual summary column so I’m not seeing it twice.)

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Meade, @PayWay369, @ebannister

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-11-13 at 18.51.482126×370 34.6 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - Subitem Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!
